requirement: UI new work page now submits, spine status shows a new work item, work doesn't start, spine resume returns now active workflows found to resume. UI Work Detail page returns work item not found.

tasks.description:
{
  "plan_summary": "Diagnose and fix workflow creation, persistence, and resumption issues causing submitted work items to remain inactive and undiscoverable by ID.

feature_slices.description: Ensure new work items are persisted to the shared data store used by status, resume, and detail services instead of a transient or separate location.
acceptance: New work submission writes to the same repository or table read by status, resume, and detail
Work item appears in spine status and can be retrieved by ID via Work Detail page

feature_slices.description: Trigger or register an active workflow instance immediately after successful work item creation so that resume can return it.
acceptance: Resume endpoint returns the newly created workflow as active
Work begins execution instead of remaining in created-but-idle state

feature_slices.description: Guarantee that the ID returned after submission is usable without transformation for resume and Work Detail retrieval.
acceptance: Work Detail page loads the created item using the returned ID
No 'not found' or 'no active workflows' errors for freshly submitted items

task_outputs:
{
  "plan_summary": "Diagnose and fix workflow creation, persistence, and resumption issues causing submitted work items to remain inactive and undiscoverable by ID.",
  "architecture": {
    "components": [
      {
        "name": "WorkSubmissionHandler",
        "purpose": "Handles new work creation from UI and persists initial work item state",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/ui/work.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/workflow.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkflowEngine", "StateStore"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkflowEngine",
        "purpose": "Manages workflow lifecycle including start/resume decisions",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/engine.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/workflow.py"],
        "dependencies": ["StateStore"]
      },
      {
        "name": "StateStore",
        "purpose": "Persistent storage for work items and workflow states",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/store.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/db/models.py"],
        "dependencies": []
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkDetailUI",
        "purpose": "Retrieves and displays work item details by ID",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/ui/work_detail.py"],
        "dependencies": ["StateStore"]
      }
    ],
    "data_flow": "UI submits work -> WorkSubmissionHandler creates item in StateStore -> WorkflowEngine polls for new items but fails to transition -> Resume checks active state -> Detail lookup fails due to ID mismatch or missing row",
    "interfaces": [
      {
        "name": "IWorkStore",
        "methods": ["create_work", "get_work", "list_active"],
        "purpose": "Contract between handlers and persistent storage for work items"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-001",
      "title": "Explore codebase structure and key modules",
      "description": "Identify files for work submission, engine, store, and UI detail retrieval",
      "type": "document",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine"],
      "dependencies": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Directory tree and relevant module paths documented"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "No rollback needed"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-002",
      "title": "Trace new work submission flow",
      "description": "Add logging or inspection to confirm ID generation and store write on submission",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/ui/work.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/workflow.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Submission path logged with generated work_id and stored record"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert logging additions"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-003",
      "title": "Diagnose engine start condition",
      "description": "Identify why newly submitted work does not transition to started state",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/engine.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-002"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Root cause (missing status, query filter, or trigger) located"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "rollback": "Remove any diagnostic code"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-004",
      "title": "Fix resume / active workflow detection",
      "description": "Ensure resume returns newly created items by correcting active-state query or status transition",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/engine.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/spine/store.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Resume returns the submitted work item"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "rollback": "Restore previous query logic"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-005",
      "title": "Fix Work Detail lookup",
      "description": "Resolve 'not found' by aligning ID usage between creation and detail endpoint",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/ui/work_detail.py", "/home/pat/projects/spine/db/models.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-004"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Work Detail page returns the created item"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert ID handling change"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-006",
      "title": "Add integration test for end-to-end flow",
      "description": "Create test covering submit -> status visible -> resume finds item -> detail loads",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/tests/test_work_flow.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-005"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Test passes and covers all reported symptoms"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete test file"
    }
  ],
  "testing_strategy": {
    "unit_tests": ["test store CRUD for work items", "test engine state transitions"],
    "integration_tests": ["submit through UI, verify engine finds item, resume succeeds, detail fetches item"],
    "manual_tests": ["Run UI new work submission and confirm status/resume/detail"],
    "test_order": ["TASK-006"]
  },
  "checkpoints": [
    {
      "after_task": "TASK-003",
      "verify": ["Engine diagnostic confirms why work is not started"],
      "rollback_to": "TASK-002"
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": ["Existing test harness can drive UI submission and spine CLI/DB"],
  "blocked_by": []
}

{
  "plan_summary": "Diagnose and fix the broken work item submission flow: submission succeeds and item is created but never activated/started, resume ignores it, and detail lookup fails.",
  "architecture": {
    "components": [
      {
        "name": "WorkSubmissionHandler",
        "purpose": "Processes new work item creation from UI and persists the item",
        "files": ["src/work/submit.py", "src/models/work_item.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkStore", "WorkflowEngine"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkflowEngine",
        "purpose": "Starts, resumes and manages active workflows for work items",
        "files": ["src/workflow/engine.py", "src/workflow/resume.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkStore"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkStore",
        "purpose": "Persistent storage and retrieval of work items and their status",
        "files": ["src/store/work_store.py", "src/db/models.py"],
        "dependencies": []
      }
    ],
    "data_flow": "UI POST -> WorkSubmissionHandler creates WorkItem (status=created) -> should trigger WorkflowEngine.start() which writes active state to WorkStore -> Resume queries active items -> Detail reads by ID",
    "interfaces": [
      {
        "name": "IWorkStore",
        "methods": ["create_work_item", "get_work_item", "list_active_workflows"],
        "purpose": "Contract for all persistence operations needed by submission and workflow logic"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-001",
      "title": "Reproduce the bug and capture current behavior",
      "description": "Submit a new work item via UI, observe spine status, resume and detail endpoints, log the exact state of the created work item",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["tests/integration/test_work_submission.py"],
      "dependencies": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Reproduction script or test passes and shows work item with status=created, no active workflow record, resume returns empty, detail returns 404"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "No code change yet"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-002",
      "title": "Identify missing activation call after submission",
      "description": "Find where WorkSubmissionHandler persists the item and verify whether it calls WorkflowEngine.start() or equivalent",
      "type": "document",
      "files": ["src/work/submit.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Code location documented showing the gap between create and start"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "None"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-003",
      "title": "Implement work item activation after successful creation",
      "description": "Modify WorkSubmissionHandler to call WorkflowEngine.start() immediately after persisting the new work item and store the returned workflow_id",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/work/submit.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-002"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["New work item creation results in an active workflow record in the store"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "rollback": "Revert the start() call and keep work item in 'created' state only"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-004",
      "title": "Fix resume query to include newly created work items",
      "description": "Update WorkflowEngine.resume() and list_active_workflows to return items whose workflow was just started via submit path",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/workflow/resume.py", "src/store/work_store.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["spine resume now returns the workflow started from new work submission"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert to previous active-only filter logic"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-005",
      "title": "Ensure Work Detail page can locate items started via submit",
      "description": "Verify/get_work_item returns the work item regardless of whether its workflow has been processed yet",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/work/detail.py", "src/store/work_store.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-004"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["UI Work Detail page successfully returns the submitted work item"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "None"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-006",
      "title": "Add/verify unit and integration tests for the fixed flow",
      "description": "Create or update tests covering submit->start->resume->detail happy path",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["tests/unit/test_submission.py", "tests/integration/test_work_lifecycle.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-005"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["All new tests pass and cover the previously broken path"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Remove failing test files and revert test additions"
    }
  ],
  "testing_strategy": {
    "unit_tests": ["WorkSubmissionHandler.create", "WorkflowEngine.start", "WorkStore.get_work_item"],
    "integration_tests": ["full submit-resume-detail cycle", "resume returns items created via UI"],
    "manual_tests": ["Submit via real UI, call spine status, spine resume, open Work Detail page"],
    "test_order": ["TASK-001", "TASK-006"]
  },
  "checkpoints": [
    {
      "after_task": "TASK-003",
      "verify": ["New work submission creates both a work_item and an active workflow record"],
      "rollback_to": "TASK-002"
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": ["Work items are meant to be automatically activated on submission rather than requiring separate start"],
  "blocked_by": []
}
